overall.description: First-person perspective gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark forest at night. The player illuminates the path with a handheld torch that appears midway through the clip, revealing dense trees and undergrowth. The footage has the visual characteristics of a modern survival-horror video game with realistic lighting and atmospheric darkness.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the pitch-black forest path, navigating by minimal ambient light

entered.detail: tall coniferous trees lining both sides of the forest path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with scattered stones
tall grass and low vegetation flanking the path
thick overhead canopy blocking most of the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a very dark forest at night. The path is narrow and surrounded by dense trees and undergrowth. Visibility is extremely limited due to darkness, with only the silhouettes of nearby trees visible against the slightly lighter sky.

events.description: character raises a wooden torch and ignites it, casting warm orange light on the immediate surroundings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the forest while holding a lit torch in the left hand to illuminate the path ahead

entered.detail: wooden torch with visible flame held in the character's left hand, casting dynamic shadows

segments.scene_description: The character lights a torch, dramatically improving visibility. The warm flame illuminates the dirt path, tree trunks, and grass undergrowth as the character continues walking forward through the dense forest. The torch casts flickering shadows on the surrounding vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path alongside rock cliff face

events.description: large rock cliff face emerges on the right side of the path, changing the spatial enclosure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path while passing a large rock formation on the right

entered.detail: tall vertical rock wall with rough texture rising beside the path
leafless dead tree standing in the middle distance

segments.scene_description: The path opens slightly as the character approaches and walks alongside a large rock cliff face on the right. The torch continues to illuminate the path, now revealing the textured rock surface and a dead tree ahead. The forest density decreases slightly as the terrain becomes more rocky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a pitch-black forest that transforms from a void of silhouettes into a flickering, illuminated wilderness. It begins with a walk along a narrow path where visibility is extremely limited, leaving only the dark outlines of dense trees against a dim sky. As the character lights a torch, the scene shifts dramatically, casting a warm, flickering glow that reveals the textures of the dirt path, tree trunks, and surrounding undergrowth. The camera then continues forward as the dense woods begin to thin, moving alongside a large, textured rock cliff face on the right. Finally, the terrain becomes increasingly rocky, with the torchlight revealing a dead tree standing ahead as the forest opens up.
